title: Usopp Challenges Luffy
description: Luffy and Usopp fight over the ship, forcing the crew to watch friendship and authority collide.
scene: Across pages 17, this part follows Luffy, Usopp, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. Luffy and Usopp fight over the ship, forcing the crew to watch friendship and authority collide.
summary: Luffy and Usopp fight over the ship, forcing the crew to watch friendship and authority collide.
